endingCommit: the commit titled 'Implement screenshot-grounded HyprMod fidelity fixes' that adds this report (a report cannot know its own commit hash)

phase1_bezierWindowing.change: open_bezier_editor_window (separate gtk::Window) replaced by open_bezier_editor_dialog: adw::Dialog + adw::ToolbarView/HeaderBar presented on the main window; the row opens it through list selection so pointer, keyboard, and assistive tech share one path
phase1_bezierWindowing.evidence: /home/kyo/review-after/06-hs-bezier-editor-overlay-after.png shows the editor as a centered in-window modal overlay dimming the Animations page; zero new compositor clients

phase2_animationsPage.change: Six reference sections (General scalar rows via section_for_row, then ANIMATION_RECORD_GROUPS: Global / Windows & Layers / Fading / Workspaces / Other); records render as switch rows with animation_record_subtitle ('4.0ds · easeOutQuint', 'disabled · 1.0ds · default', 'inherited · …'); the row switch stages the enabled flag for the row menu's supervised preview/gated Save; the workbench card moved to Safety Details; Bezier row gained themed curve icon + chevron
phase2_animationsPage.evidence: /home/kyo/review-after/05-side-by-side-animations-after.png — the two pages are structurally near-identical; no raw '(enabled 1, bezier …)' text and no proof/safety prose on the page

phase3_pickerDialog.change: Picker is an opaque adw::Dialog (never a popover): pill Cancel / centered title / suggested Select, background page dimmed
phase3_pickerDialog.evidence: /home/kyo/review-after/03-hs-color-picker-palette-after.png — no page content readable through the surface

phase4_paletteView.change: picker_palette_columns(): nine columns (six hues, brown, light neutrals, dark neutrals) of five contiguous shades with rounded column ends; Custom row with plus tile, session-remembered custom swatches (thread-local CUSTOM_PICKER_COLORS, deduped, capped 8), selected-swatch checkmark

phase5_customView.change: Layout reordered to eyedropper | live preview | hex entry over vertical rainbow hue bar + continuous SV plane (two cairo gradients, no stepped cells) with full-length crosshair, then checkerboard alpha gradient slider with knob; hex edits sync the HSV state; dialog sizes to the visible view (no clipped alpha)

phase6_colorRowGeometry.change: Stop tiles enlarged to rounded 44x26 (rounded_rect_path clip in live_swatch_area, padding stripped via css class); control order now swatch/remove/swatch/remove/angle spinner/plus (add-stop moved after the angle)

phase7_numericControls.change: Scalar numeric ValueEntry rows render as compact spin buttons (integer step/digits for integral values); wide-range integer sliders drop the two-decimal formatting ('0', not '0.00'); short_description sentence-cases subtitles; curated titles for general.col.nogroup_border[_active] ('No-group border color' / 'Active no-group border color')
phase7_numericControls.evidence: /home/kyo/review-after/01-side-by-side-general-after.png — Gaps rows show 5 −/+ spinners, Border size shows 0

phase8_sidebarHiding.status: fixed and live-verified (root cause was a real routing bug)
phase8_sidebarHiding.rootCause: xwayland.* rows live in the model's 'display' tab and ecosystem.* rows in 'permissions', but both PageSpecs claimed their prefixes from 'system' — the claims matched nothing, sidebar_items hid both pages, and the rows silently fell to the Monitors/Permissions rest pages (reachability stayed 341 so no guard fired)
phase8_sidebarHiding.change: xwayland page source_tab -> display; ecosystem page source_tab -> permissions; guard added asserting the claims and that Monitors no longer swallows xwayland rows
phase8_sidebarHiding.note: the permissions tab's three rows are all ecosystem.*, so the Permissions page now legitimately claims zero rows and hides — same version-aware hiding rule, now honest
phase8_sidebarHiding.evidence: /home/kyo/review-after/01-side-by-side-general-after.png — XWayland and Ecosystem visible under ADVANCED

deferred.reason: needs XDG desktop portal (org.freedesktop.portal.Screenshot PickColor) DBus integration — too large for this pass; the button ships visible but disabled with an accessible 'not available yet' label, per the task's explicit allowance
the task required at minimum session memory; cross-session persistence needs a settings-storage decision

deferred.item: Inherited-record subtitle values differ from the reference for inherited rows (e.g. Zoom Factor 'inherited · 0.0ds' vs reference 'inherited · 8.0ds')
deferred.reason: the subtitle honestly reflects the hyprctl readback for non-overridden records; the reference computes an effective inherited value from its schema — synthesizing that here would show values the runtime readback does not report

deferred.item: after-screenshot 02 shows opaque white/black tiles without visible checkerboard
deferred.reason: the live config's border colors are fully opaque, so there is honestly no transparency to show; the checkerboard renders under translucent values (visible in the picker's custom swatches and alpha slider captures)

screenshotNotes: Both apps ran live and were driven read-only over AT-SPI (navigation and button clicks only; a guard in the driver refuses any node whose text contains apply/save). The reference app was only navigated, never edited. Every capture above was re-read as pixels and compared against the /home/kyo/review originals before being accepted; two defects were caught and fixed this way (clipped alpha slider from a scroll container; missing draw-arc icon replaced by a themed-icon fallback chain).

validation.cargoTest: 268 test binaries / 1095 tests, 0 failures (full suite rerun after the final code changes)
validation.cargoBuildRelease: success (the binary used for the re-captures)
validation.gtkEvidenceMatrix: not rerun this pass — the accessibility-name surface the harness reads was extended (animation rows) but existing probe targets are unchanged; run on demand

newGuards: tests/screenshot_fidelity_fixes.rs: bezier dialog not a toplevel; six-section Animations grouping; friendly subtitles with no raw record text; no proof/safety prose on Animations; picker is an opaque dialog; stacked palette columns + custom swatches; vertical hue / smooth SV / checkerboard alpha; color row control order; numeric spinners + integer formatting; xwayland/ecosystem page claims

safety.notes: Presentation-only pass: the gated preview/save flow is unchanged (same controllers, same gates, relocated controls); the reference app was browsed read-only; no reload path added; SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS and the 341-row reachability guard unchanged
